allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Phase 6: Complete migration & critical bug fixes' --body ':*)
Bash(grep -n "^function openSlotOverlay\\|^function closeSlotOverlay\\|^function triggerImport\\|^function deleteSlot\\|^function _confirmOverwrite" index.html js/*.js)
Bash(grep -n "^const Story\\|^const MapUI\\|^const MapEngine" js/*.js js/**/*.js)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['id']\) for i in d]")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('/c/Users/ASUS/VVI/rpg+/data/classes.json'\); const effects = new Set\(\); data.forEach\(c => c.abilities.forEach\(ab => Object.keys\(ab.effect || {}\).forEach\(k => effects.add\(k\)\)\)\); console.log\([...effects].sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); effects = set\(\); [effects.update\(ab.get\('effect', {}\).keys\(\)\) for cls in data for ab in cls.get\('abilities', []\)]; print\('\\\\n'.join\(sorted\(effects\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); ranges = {}; [[\(ranges.setdefault\(k, {'min': v, 'max': v}\), ranges[k].update\({'min': min\(ranges[k]['min'], v\), 'max': max\(ranges[k]['max'], v\)}\)\) for k, v in enemy.get\('stats', {}\).items\(\)] for enemy in data]; [\(print\(f'{k}: {v[\\"min\\"]} to {v[\\"max\\"]}'\)\) for k, v in sorted\(ranges.items\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); ultimates = [ab for cls in data for ab in cls.get\('abilities', []\) if ab.get\('isUltimate'\)]; print\('\\\\n'.join\(sorted\(set\([ab['id'] for ab in ultimates]\)\)\)\)")
Bash(gh pr create --title 'Audit fixes: AOE animations, ability effects, balance & cleanup' --body ':*)
